name: @open-neko/plugin-slack
description: Slack actions for OpenNeko: post messages, send DMs, react to messages, and look up users/channels. Runs in a microsandbox VM with network egress limited to slack.com.

requires_env.description: xoxb-... bot token from your Slack app. Needs scopes: chat:write, im:write (for DMs), reactions:write, users:read, users:read.email (for email lookup), channels:read, groups:read (for channel lookup).
